articles.title: With spears & swords, Nihangs stay locked inside Uttarakhand gurdwara
articles.description: A tense standoff at a Uttarakhand gurdwara entered its third day with Nihang Sikhs holding out, reportedly demanding the release of four arrested individuals. Punjab's Chief Minister has urged an amicable resolution through talks. While police maintain the incident is unrelated to a prior clash in Karnaprayag, a Sikh organization suggests the dispute stemmed from accommodation issues for pilgrims heading to Hemkund Sahib.
articles.full_text: Special Correspondent at The Times of India, Dehradun, covering global issues with special focus on South Asia, defence, crime, sports and human interest stories. Have profound love for knowing about food and cultures around the world. Read More

articles.title: Illegal Lucknow building had 2016 demolition order, someone revoked it within 60 days
articles.description: A devastating fire has cast a shadow over a Lucknow building's past. Documents reveal a 2016 demolition order for unauthorized construction was controversially revoked within two months. The property, initially for residential use, was later allegedly used commercially, a key focus in the ongoing fire investigation. Officials are probing the circumstances surrounding the order's reversal.

articles.title: 2 charred to death, 2 trapped as massive fire erupts at Andhra energy plant
articles.description: Tragedy struck Dakshin Energy's Paravada facility Tuesday morning as a massive fire claimed the lives of two young workers, Trinadh (27) and Venkatesh (24). Two others are feared trapped amidst the inferno, which is believed to have been fueled by the large plastic inventory. Firefighting efforts are ongoing, with investigations into the cause set to commence once the blaze is contained.

articles.title: Nitish Reddy ruled out of T20Is against Ireland; unlikely for England series too
articles.description: It is learnt that Reddy's quadriceps injury, which kept him out of the 2nd ODI against Afghanistan in Lucknow, has flared up and requires attention before he can take the field again.

articles.title: Did Iran agree to IAEA inspections for 'nuclear honesty'? Trump, Vance say so
articles.description: The recent US-Iran nuclear discussions in Switzerland ended with mixed messages regarding inspection agreements. US Vice President Vance asserted that Iran had consented to IAEA inspector access, labeling it as a significant achievement. In contrast, Iran's Foreign Ministry spokesperson refuted any new commitments on nuclear matters, indicating that discussions had yet to begin. This discrepancy underscores the continuing frictions surrounding Tehran's nuclear program, particularly as Iran has previously curtailed IAEA access.

articles.title: 'Foundation for a final deal': US hits pause on Iranian oil sanctions after nuclear push
articles.description: The US has temporarily lifted sanctions on Iranian oil for 60 days, allowing its production and sale. This move follows Iran's agreement to permit UN nuclear inspectors and ensure free passage through the Strait of Hormuz. Vice President JD Vance hailed the understanding as a crucial foundation for a future deal, though nuclear talks are still in early stages. Any potential asset releases would be restricted for American benefit.

articles.title: Oil prices rebound as US-Iran peace hopes temper Hormuz supply fears
articles.description: On Tuesday, oil prices enjoyed a modest rise as they bounced back from a previous decline. Investors are tentatively hopeful about the ongoing US-Iran peace discussions, yet they remain cautious about the reopening of the Strait of Hormuz for crude exports. Despite early indicators showing improved maritime movements and declining US strategic oil reserves, skepticism lingers as traders look for solid proof of restoring shipping operations.

articles.title: ODI tickets worth Rs 52.36 lakh went unsold: Khanna
articles.description: "Tickets worth Rupees 52,36,000 were unsold. Why all the tickets were not sold-out? DDCA started online ticket sale quite late that too without proper advertisement," Khanna claimed in a media release.

articles.title: Telangana school bandh today: Schools likely to remain closed as ABVP protests fee hikes and reforms
articles.description: ABVP has called for a statewide school bandh in Telangana over concerns related to private school fee hikes, government school infrastructure gaps, vacant teaching posts and delayed uniform distribution. Several schools in Hyderabad announced holidays ahead of the protest. The organisation has demanded fee regulation laws, stronger monitoring of educational institutions, implementation of NEP-2020 and improvements in government school facilities. Parents have raised concerns about disruptions to classes during the academic year.

articles.title: CBSE revaluation miracle: Ranchi student's score jumps from 95.2% to 500/500 after gaining 24 marks
articles.description: The release of the CBSE Class 12 revaluation results on June 22 brought an extraordinary success story from Ranchi. Commerce student Avani Kejriwal's score increased by 24 marks after re-evaluation, taking her from 95.2 per cent to a perfect 500 out of 500. Her achievement highlights the importance of the board's review mechanism for students seeking reassessment.

Her achievement highlights the importance of the board's review mechanism for students seeking reassessment.

articles.title: UGC NET June 2026 re-exam scheduled for affected candidates at this centre; check details here
articles.description: The National Testing Agency has announced a re-examination for candidates affected by technical issues during the UGC NET June 2026 Shift I examination at the CT Group of Institutions Examination Centre, Jalandhar. The re-test will be conducted on July 5, 2026, at 3:00 PM at the same venue. NTA clarified that the examination has not been cancelled nationwide and applies only to eligible candidates who were unable to take or complete the test.

The re-test will be conducted on July 5, 2026, at 3:00 PM at the same venue. NTA clarified that the examination has not been cancelled nationwide and applies only to eligible candidates who were unable to take or complete the test.

articles.title: Assam HSLC Compartment result 2026 to be out today at sebaonline.org: Check steps to download scorecards
articles.description: The Assam State School Education Board (ASSEB) is set to announce the HSLC Compartment Result 2026 on June 23 at 11 AM. Students who appeared for the supplementary Class 10 examinations can access their scorecards online using their roll number and login credentials. Successful candidates will be eligible for higher secondary admissions, while further guidance will be provided to those who do not clear the examination.

articles.title: OTT release of documentary titled ‘Baahubali: The Torchbearer’
articles.description: Fans of the legendary 'Baahubali' saga can look forward to 'Baahubali: The Torchbearer,' a new documentary that will soon premiere on OTT platforms. This captivating behind-the-scenes film delves into the creative journey of the franchise that captivated audiences across the globe. With appearances from the cherished cast and crew, it honors ten years of cinematic brilliance and will stream on Netflix worldwide starting June 26, 2026.

articles.title: Prince Harry reunion unlikely to heal Prince William rift
articles.description: With Prince Harry's family visit to the UK on the horizon, analysts predict little chance of mending his relationship with Prince William. Royal experts highlight that William's current status and past grievances will pose significant barriers to reconciliation. Although a one-on-one meeting might signify hope, they recommend a cautious stance on immediate breakthroughs, advocating for a gradual healing of family fractures.

articles.title: Anne Hathaway focuses on family as she awaits baby No. 3
articles.description: Anne Hathaway is joyfully expecting her third child with husband Adam Shulman, sharing the news with a heartwarming Instagram post. The actress, already a mother to two sons, is balancing this exciting personal milestone with her thriving career, including upcoming film releases. Hathaway's approach emphasizes gratitude and professionalism, ensuring her personal news complements, rather than overshadows, her professional commitments, as she cherishes this special family time.

articles.title: Kylie Jenner and Timothée Chalamet go on a date in the Hamptons
articles.description: Kylie Jenner and Timothée Chalamet were recently caught enjoying a laid-back getaway in the Hamptons, where they dined at a trendy restaurant and indulged in a shopping spree. Prior to this, they were seen cycling through Manhattan, just before Chalamet joined the New York Knicks parade, showing his support for the team from their Celebrity Row. Their regular appearances at Knicks games have sparked widespread speculation about their romance.
